next_steps: Repetitive nerve stimulation (RNS) and needle electromyography (EMG)
Lumbar puncture for cerebrospinal fluid analysis (protein, cytology, oligoclonal bands)
Acetylcholine receptor and MuSK antibody testing
Imaging (MRI spine) to evaluate for structural nerve root compression or malignancy
Screening for underlying malignancy (CT chest/abdomen/pelvis and serum protein electrophoresis)
Continued noninvasive positive pressure ventilation and speech-language pathology evaluation for safe swallow management

differential_diagnoses: Brainstem stroke (chronic with superimposed metabolic encephalopathy)
next_steps: Serum and urine protein electrophoresis with immunofixation and serum free light chains
Echocardiogram with strain imaging to evaluate for amyloid infiltration
Repetitive nerve stimulation and needle electromyography
Acetylcholine receptor and MuSK antibody testing
Lumbar puncture for protein and cytology
